plan.goal: prism-general-improvements: improve PRISM MCP and repo-awareness dogfooding quality by fixing first-hop doc discovery noise, strengthening concept-to-concrete follow-through, making session/task context clearer, improving compact-tool ergonomics, and adding better governing-section or cross-doc navigation.
